title: sambucus aurea
intro: Sambucus aurea, also known as the golden elderberry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Adoxaceae family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Sambucus aurea include reducing the severity and duration of colds and flu, relieving sinus congestion and coughs, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tea, tincture, and syrup, and is often used as a natural treatment for various health issues.
